description: Deferred from bl-be5f (core §12/§13). The shipped tracker (bl-4522) adopt path assumes operating/ is ALREADY a clone with the branch checked out; it cannot materialize an ABSENT hop into a freshly-init'd empty dir. This blocks the load-bearing 2-hop case (spec bl-2e26 §12): a fresh clone of a code repo auto-onboarding onto a central task store (landing -> origin:balls -> central:balls). Core (bl-be5f) lays operating/ -> plugins/tracker/<enc-remote>/ + walks the trail over LOCAL checkouts; the tracker must fetch+checkout an absent terminus into the core-init'd dir so the walk has more than the landing to traverse end-to-end.
title: Tracker adopt-into-empty: fresh-clone materialization (close the 2-hop trail loop)
